name: Escape from Umbar
text: You are playing Nightmare mode. Forced: After an enemy engages a player, that player must either remove 1 progress from the main quest or that enemy makes an immediate attack.

name: Escape from Umbar
text: Begin with the standard quest deck and encounter deck for the Escape from Umbar scenario. Remove the following cards, in the specified quantities, from the standard encounter deck: 1x Umbar Sentry 2x Umbar Square 1x Haradrim Estate 1x In Enemy Territory 2x Enfeebled 1x Southron Captain 3x Southron Soldier 1x Southron Archer Then, shuffle the encounter cards in this Nightmare Deck into the remainder of the standard Escape from Umbar encounter deck. Finally, flip this setup card over and place it next to the quest deck. Its effect remains active throughout the game, which is now ready to begin.

name: Captain of the Guard
text: Cannot have attachments. While Captain of the Guard is in the staging area, it gets +X [threat]. While Captain of the Guard is engaged with a player, it gets +X [attack]. X is the number of progress tokens on the main quest. Quest Action: Remove exactly 5 progress tokens from the main quest.

name: Umbar City Watch
text: Forced: When Umbar City Watch attacks, either remove 2 progress from the main quest, or the engaged player raises their threat by 3.
shadow: Shadow: Raise your threat by 2 (4 instead if there are 10 or more progress tokens on the main quest.)

name: Bounty Hunter
text: Forced: When Bounty Hunter attacks, either remove 1 progress from the main quest, or deal 1 damage to the defending character.
shadow: Shadow: Deal 1 damage to the defending character.

name: Watch Tower
text: While Watch Tower is in the staging area, it gains: “Forced: At the end of the quest phase, remove 1 progress token from the main quest, if able.” Travel: Discard cards from the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. Add that enemy to the staging area.

name: Crowded Marketplace
text: No more than 5 progress tokens can be placed on a quest during the quest phase. Travel: Raise each player’s threat by 3.

name: Sound the Alarm!
text: When Revealed: All enemies in the staging area make engagement checks. Each enemy which remains in the staging area gains Archery 2 until the end of the round. If no enemies remain in the staging area, Sound the Alarm! gains Surge.
shadow: Shadow: Choose a non-unique enemy in the staging area. Engage it and deal it a shadow card.

name: Increased Patrols
text: When Revealed: Return all enemies engaged with players to the staging area. If this effect returned no enemies, Increased Patrols gains Surge.
shadow: Shadow: Return attacking enemy to the staging area after it attacks.

name: Lead Them Astray
text: Forced: At the end of the quest phase, place 1 resource token on this quest. Then, remove X progress from the main quest, where X is the number of resource tokens on this quest. Response: When this quest is defeated, choose and discard an enemy in the staging area.
